strings.panel.p1.narration.1.html: Radd's evil brother Gnarl has just transformed into his ultimate mode: the Gnarlborg 2000. (...Yeah, I know, just go with it.)
strings.panel.p2.bubble.left.html: And now, dear brother, you shall learn true pain...
strings.panel.p3.bubble.left.html: What? Dare you not take my threat seriously?
strings.panel.p4.bubble.right.html: Nothing, I mean it's just - - you realize that you don't exist below the waist, right? You're half a man.
strings.panel.p5.bubble.left.html: Ooh, you're gonna pay for that!
strings.panel.p5.bubble.right.html: Hmph, well at least you got one big gun...
